title: Irv Watanabe
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Irv Watanabe''' was a letterer for multiple ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]]. Outside of ''Star Wars'', Watanabe also worked as an editor, colorist, and cover artist for various comic series.<ref name="CBDB">{{WebCite|url=http://www.comicbookdb.com/creator.php?ID=621|text=Irv Watanabe in The Comic Book Database|archivedate=20111203171434|nolive=1}}</ref>
